description.value:
Prerequisite: Advanced Bloodline (Sharingan), Sharingan +4, Genjutsu, Ninjutsu and Taijutsu 18 ranks.

Benefit: You can partially activate your Sharingan, reducing its cost to 1 Chakra per 10 minutes. While partially active, you only benefit from half the normal Sharingan bonuses (rounded down, maximum +3), and do not benefit from Offensive Foresight, Glare or High Speed Sight. You can still use techniques requiring an active Sharingan, use Ninja's Mimicry, concentrate to See Chakra and activate the Mangekyou Sharingan (which increases the Sharingan bonus by +1, up to +4 maximum in this state).
